sqlMap.select:
SELECT pe_id, member_id, grant_amount, expire_date FROM point_expiry WHERE swept_yn = 'N' AND member_id >= 9
expire_date < #cutoff#
ORDER BY pe_id
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO point_ledger (member_id, delta, reason, reg_date) VALUES (#memberId#, #delta#, 'EXPIRE', #regDate#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE point_expiry SET swept_yn = 'Y' WHERE pe_id = #peId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT ledger_id, member_id, delta, reason, reg_date FROM point_ledger ORDER BY ledger_id DESC
